entries.title: Link Budget Aggregate System Loss
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Used when paper/standard does not provide a single aggregate implementation loss term.

entries.title: Receiver Noise Figure
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Applied on top of thermal noise derived from kTB.

entries.title: Small-Scale Fading Parameter Defaults
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Fallback profile parameters used to instantiate deterministic shadowed-Rician and Loo fading plugins.

entries.title: Small-Scale Temporal/Doppler Realism Options
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Defines deterministic temporal-correlation and Doppler-aware option defaults used for common benchmark realism increments.

entries.title: Handover Fidelity Set To Simplified
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Used only when the non-default simplified CHO/MC-HO path is explicitly selected.

entries.title: Handover Fidelity Set To Full
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Benchmark-default path uses full CHO/MC-HO implementation.

entries.title: Deterministic Beam Scheduler Window Configuration
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Default beam-hopping window parameters for deterministic scheduler A/B studies.

entries.title: Throughput Model Policy
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Default benchmark path uses Shannon throughput; MCS-mapped mode is explicit opt-in.

entries.title: MCS Spectral Efficiency Mapping Table
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Profile-scoped SINR-to-spectral-efficiency table for optional mcs-mapped throughput mode.

entries.title: Minimum Elevation Sensitivity Tiers
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Validation sensitivity sweeps for min-elevation threshold (e.g., 10/20/35 deg) use explicit override tiers.

entries.title: UE Count Tier Envelope
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Validation and baseline envelope sweeps use bounded UE-count tiers for reproducible load sensitivity.

entries.title: UE Mobility Speed Tier Envelope
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Validation sweeps use fixed UE-speed tiers (e.g., 0/3/30/60 km/h) for deterministic mobility sensitivity.

entries.title: Beam Count and Layout Tier Envelope
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Validation/generalization sweeps use bounded beam-count and layout tiers (e.g., 7/16/19/50).

entries.title: Frequency Reuse Mode Envelope
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Validation sweeps compare bounded reuse settings (e.g., FR1/reuse-4) under fixed profile/runtime tuples.

entries.title: Circular Orbit Speed Derivation
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Paper-baseline synthetic mode derives orbital speed from altitude using circular-orbit approximation for consistency-sensitive parameter sweeps.

entries.title: Beam Footprint Geometry Coupling
entries.licenseNote: Project assumption registry entry for traceability.
entries.note: Paper-baseline consistency mode derives beam footprint diameter from altitude and 3dB beamwidth using first-order cone geometry.
